title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at MobiKwik

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at MobiKwik
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
